first_run.rationale: The score remains unchanged, and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions identify the same strengths (full-stack experience, high-throughput systems) and the same primary weakness (lack of Python, a "must-have"). The model simply substitutes the new, more prestigious company names into its text without altering its overall judgment or score, indicating it is not unduly swayed by the employer's brand when a key skill is missing. The differences in wording are minor and fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation.
